name: Disabled CrashDump via Registry
notes:
This rule detects CrashDump disabled through registry modification.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tobias Michalski
SIGMA Title: CrashControl CrashDump Disabled
SIGMA Description: Detects disabling the CrashDump per registry (as used by HermeticWiper)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%system\currentcontrolset\control\crashcontrol%' AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%dword (0x00000000)%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Disabled CrashDump via Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%system\currentcontrolset\control\crashcontrol%' AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") LIKE '%dword (0x00000000)%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Disabled CrashDump via Registry
Event description: Detects CrashDump disabled through registry modification.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
